morning.title: Florida sues OpenAI and Sam Altman over AI risks
morning.summary: Florida has filed a lawsuit against OpenAI and its CEO Sam Altman, citing the risks associated with AI-powered technologies.

morning.title: IBM CEO says there is 'no way' spending on AI data centers will pay off
morning.summary: IBM's CEO has expressed skepticism about the financial returns on investing in AI data centers, stating that the spending will not pay off.

morning.title: CS336: Language Modeling from Scratch
morning.summary: Stanford's CS336 course provides a comprehensive introduction to language modeling, covering the fundamentals of natural language processing and deep learning.

morning.title: What appear to be biochemical processes may be a natural feature of geology
morning.summary: Researchers have discovered that certain geological processes may be capable of mimicking biochemical reactions, blurring the line between living and non-living systems.

morning.title: IBM acquires Red Hat
morning.summary: IBM has acquired Red Hat, a leading provider of open-source software solutions, in a move to strengthen its position in the hybrid cloud market.

gym.title: Every Bond Market In The World Is Breaking
gym.summary: The global bond market is experiencing a crisis, with far-reaching implications for investors and the economy.

gym.title: I tried to optimize my life. It made it worse.
gym.summary: The speaker reflects on their experience with life optimization, highlighting the potential pitfalls and drawbacks of striving for perfection.

gym.title: New Claude Opus 4.8: 15 Things You May’ve Missed
gym.summary: The video explores the latest updates and features of Claude Opus 4.8, a cutting-edge AI model with significant implications for the field.

gym.title: Programmable Money Is The Future
gym.summary: The speaker discusses the potential of programmable money to revolutionize the financial system, enabling new forms of transactions and economic activity.

gym.title: The Science of Learning & Speaking Languages
gym.summary: The video delves into the science behind language learning, providing insights and strategies for improving language skills and accelerating the learning process.

gym.title: Is AI lying to us?
gym.summary: The video explores the potential risks and consequences of AI deception, highlighting the need for transparency and accountability in AI development.
